description: Conditional branch — true path sets r_q=1, false path ($display) is dead code. Loops every 2 cycles.

states.name: S0
states.description: Branch on thread_0_wire$0 (always true) and set r_q = 1
states.entry: _init_0 one-shot (first cycle) OR feedback from S2

states.name: S1
states.description: Delay after true branch — merge point

states.name: S2
states.description: Feedback delay — not a distinct state, EVENTS0[5] merges combinationally into S0 on next cycle

transitions.timing: combinational feedback (EVENTS0[5] -> EVENTS0[0] via feedback loop)

outputs.description: r_q <= thread_0_wire$1 = 1'b1 (true branch action at EVENTS0[1])

notes: 6 events with a branch at EVENTS0[0]
EVENTS0[1] = EVENTS0[0] && thread_0_wire$0 (true branch, wire$0 = 1'b1, always taken)
EVENTS0[3] = EVENTS0[0] && !thread_0_wire$0 (false branch, always false — dead code)
True path: EVENTS0[0] -> EVENTS0[1] (r_q<=1) -> counter_2 -> EVENTS0[2] -> merge EVENTS0[5] -> feedback
False path: EVENTS0[0] -> EVENTS0[3] -> counter_4 -> EVENTS0[4] ($display) -> merge EVENTS0[5] — entirely dead
$display at EVENTS0[4] is dead code since EVENTS0[3] never fires
Effectively a 2-state loop that sets r_q=1 every cycle
